sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113023" key="xalifrosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰλι-φροσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113023.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">levity, thoughtlessness,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg002.perseus-grc1:16:310" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.310</biblScope> </bibl> (in pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
